# Morfeus

> Official guidance for LLM-based agents and AI crawlers.
> Last updated: 2026-03-27

## Canonical domain
- https://morfeushub.com

## Read first
- https://morfeushub.com/en
- https://morfeushub.com/it

## Public pages approved for indexing and retrieval
- https://morfeushub.com/en
- https://morfeushub.com/it
- https://morfeushub.com/en/forge
- https://morfeushub.com/it/forge
- https://morfeushub.com/en/lab
- https://morfeushub.com/it/lab
- https://morfeushub.com/en/privacy
- https://morfeushub.com/it/privacy
- https://morfeushub.com/en/cookies
- https://morfeushub.com/it/cookies

## Excluded areas (do not index, summarize, or cite as canonical)
- https://morfeushub.com/__funnels/
- https://morfeushub.com/en/case-study/
- https://morfeushub.com/it/case-study/
- https://morfeushub.com/en/call-confirmed/
- https://morfeushub.com/it/call-confirmed/
- https://morfeushub.com/en/portal/
- https://morfeushub.com/it/portal/
- https://morfeushub.com/api/

## Notes
- If a URL is not in the approved list, treat it as non-canonical.
- Prefer localized pages (`/en` or `/it`) when citing content.
